entries.reason: Synthetic inert CLI redaction fixture used only to verify that summaries omit device identity, software version, and finding detail; no credential, authentication, encryption, authorization, or operational function.

Synthetic OIDC provider-emulator test constants used only for bounded authorization-code and client-secret behavior tests against a local httptest server; no production identity-provider, credential, authorization, encryption, or operational function.

Synthetic inert test fixture used to verify that YAML decoder errors never disclose source scalar content; it is committed test data with no authentication, authorization, encryption, or operational function.

Synthetic inert test fixture used to verify that malformed YAML admission errors never disclose scalar source content; it has no authentication, authorization, encryption, credential, or operational function.
Synthetic inert semantic-report redaction fixture used only to verify that source-derived fields are omitted; no credential, authentication, encryption, authorization, or operational function.
